title: Deterministic steering-scenario harness
description:
Build a deterministic scenario harness that exercises validation steering end to end against the shipped examples, so rule and message changes are regression-tested.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] A scripted scenario suite drives the jit binary in isolated temp repositories through the evaluation scenarios: sloppy spec bodies, prose-without-bullets, typo'd headings, stray and pending req labels, premature done transitions
- [ ] Each scenario asserts the finding messages, exit codes, and enforcement point (write, validate, or transition)
- [ ] The suite runs in CI as part of the standard test layers
- [ ] Adding a scenario requires only data/fixtures, not new harness code
